시편 41:1.content: Blessed is he who considers the poor. Yahweh will deliver him in the day of evil.

시편 41:2.content: Yahweh will preserve him, and keep him alive. He shall be blessed on the earth, and he will not surrender him to the will of his enemies.

시편 41:3.content: Yahweh will sustain him on his sickbed, and restore him from his bed of illness.

시편 41:4.content: I said, “Yahweh, have mercy on me! Heal me, for I have sinned against you.”

시편 41:5.content: My enemies speak evil against me: “When will he die, and his name perish?”

시편 41:6.content: If he comes to see me, he speaks falsehood. His heart gathers iniquity to itself. When he goes abroad, he tells it.

시편 41:7.content: All who hate me whisper together against me. They imagine the worst for me.

시편 41:8.content: “An evil disease”, they say, “has afflicted him. Now that he lies he shall rise up no more.”

시편 41:9.content: Yes, my own familiar friend, in whom I trusted, who ate bread with me, has lifted up his heel against me.

시편 41:10.content: But you, Yahweh, have mercy on me, and raise me up, that I may repay them.

시편 41:11.content: By this I know that you delight in me, because my enemy doesn’t triumph over me.

시편 41:12.content: As for me, you uphold me in my integrity, and set me in your presence forever.

시편 41:13.content: Blessed be Yahweh, the God of Israel, from everlasting and to everlasting! Amen and amen.
